---
title: "Differentiation of Clay Content in Soil Samples Containing Clay, Silt, and Sand Using the Speckle Methodology"
date: 2025-10-01
author:
  - name: Da Silva, Sidney
  - name: Faulin, Gustavo
  - name: Zamariolli, Luis
  - name: Souza, Pedro
  - name: Prado, Felipe
  - name: Wetter, Niklaus
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Brazilian Journal of Physics"
  volume: 55
  issue: 5
  doi: "10.1007/s13538-025-01843-5"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Differentiation of Clay Content in Soil Samples Containing Clay, Silt, and Sand Using the Speckle Methodology</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
